name: brahmaand
description: Real-sky astronomy app — real-imagery sky atlas + real-distance 3D star-field flythrough, solar system, time machine and pro time-domain tools. Web, iOS, Android and WebXR VR. TypeScript + Vite + Three.js, fed by public astronomy services.

scripts.ios:sync: npm run build && cap sync ios
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && cap sync android
